channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-04-14 02:30 — Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band at Chase Center. Bruce Springsteen's legendary status and live reputation make this a must-see event.

item.title: Royel Otis @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-04-17 02:00 — Royel Otis at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Royel Otis is gaining buzz with their unique sound, making this show an exciting prospect.

item.title: Said the Sky @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-04-26 02:30 — Said the Sky at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Said the Sky's electronic music has a strong following and is known for captivating live performances.

item.title: The Brook & The Bluff @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-04-26 03:00 — The Brook & The Bluff at The Fillmore. The Brook & The Bluff's indie sound and storytelling prowess make them a compelling live act.

item.title: Gillian Welch & David Rawlings @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-18 03:00 → 2026-04-19 03:00 — Gillian Welch & David Rawlings at Fox Theater - Oakland. Gillian Welch & David Rawlings bring a unique twist to Grateful Dead's music, appealing to both fans and newcomers.

item.title: Oh Wonder @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-04-30 03:00 — Oh Wonder at Fox Theater - Oakland. Oh Wonder's intimate piano performance promises to be a unique and memorable experience.

item.title: Lily Allen @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-04-29 03:00 — Lily Allen at The Masonic. Lily Allen's return to the stage is highly anticipated, making this a noteworthy event.

item.title: Hatsune Miku @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-23 03:00 → 2026-04-24 03:00 — Hatsune Miku at San Jose Civic. Hatsune Miku's unique virtual concert experience continues to draw in fans from diverse backgrounds.

item.title: Dancing with the Stars @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-04-18 23:00 → 2026-04-19 03:00 — Dancing with the Stars at San Jose Civic. Demi Lovato's strong vocal performances and emotional connection with fans make this a significant show.

item.title: Behemoth @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-04-16 01:25 — Behemoth at The Regency Ballroom. Behemoth's heavy sound and theatrical performances are a draw for metal fans.

item.title: Florence + The Machine @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:30 — Florence + The Machine at Chase Center. Florence + The Machine's powerful live presence is a highlight for any concert-goer.

item.title: Thursday @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-13 02:30 — Thursday at August Hall. Thursday's return to the stage is exciting for fans of post-hardcore music.

item.title: Ambar Lucid @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-04-29 03:00 — Ambar Lucid at August Hall. Ambar Lucid's blend of genres and storytelling makes her an artist to watch.

item.title: Rene Liu @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Rene Liu at SAP Center at San Jose. Rene Liu's performance is anticipated by fans of her unique sound and style.

item.title: MATISYAHU @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-04-21 03:00 — MATISYAHU at Uptown Theatre Napa. Matisyahu's blend of reggae and spirituality continues to attract diverse audiences.

item.title: Joyce Manor @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:00 — Joyce Manor at The Fillmore. Joyce Manor's energetic performances and loyal fanbase make them a solid choice for punk rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Alice Phoebe Lou @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-04-26 03:00 — Alice Phoebe Lou at The Castro Theatre. Alice Phoebe Lou's enchanting voice and intimate performances are sure to resonate with the audience.
